title: Tealium Event Payload
description: Schema for a single event sent to the Tealium Collect HTTP API.

tealium_profile.description: Tealium profile name within the account

tealium_event.description: Event type identifier (e.g., page_view, user_login, purchase)

tealium_visitor_id.description: Visitor identifier — GUID format for anonymous visitors or __ACCOUNT_PROFILE__ATTR-ID_ATTR-VALUE__ for known visitors

tealium_datasource.description: Data source key configured in Tealium iQ

additionalProperties.description: Custom event attributes as additional key-value pairs
